title: iris unguicularis var. carica
intro: Iris unguicularis var. carica, also known as the crested iris, is a variety of flowering plant that belongs to the iris family. It is native to the Middle East and North Africa, and its medicinal properties include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful in treating wounds and skin irritations. The health benefits of the crested iris plant include its ability to soothe and calm the skin, reduce inflammation, and promote healing. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to create creams, ointments, and salves, which can be applied topically to treat various skin conditions.
